sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n45040" key="eu)ru/soros" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">εὐρύ-σορος</orth> [<foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ῠ], <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype></foreign>, <sense id="n45040.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">with wide bier</tr_> or <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">tomb</tr_>, <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">σῆμα</quote_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <title_ TEIform="title">AP</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">7.528</biblScope> </bibl> </cit> (<bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Theodorid.</author> </bibl>).</sense> </entryFree>
